title: Find Total Time Spent by Each Employee
description: Calculate total time (in minutes) each employee spent in the office each day.
constraints: (event_day, emp_id, enter_time) is the primary key
An employee can enter and leave multiple times per day
key_concept: SUM of expression (column subtraction). GROUP BY multiple columns.

hints.L1: Time per entry = out_time - in_time. Sum per employee per day.
hints.L2: SELECT event_day AS day, emp_id, SUM(out_time - in_time) AS total_time FROM Employees GROUP BY event_day, emp_id
hints.L3: SELECT event_day AS day, emp_id, SUM(out_time - in_time) AS total_time FROM Employees GROUP BY event_day, emp_id

optimal_solution: SELECT event_day AS day, emp_id, SUM(out_time - in_time) AS total_time FROM Employees GROUP BY event_day, emp_id;
